title: Undefined redirect URI when using OpenID plugin
symptom: When attempting to authenticate using the OpenID plugin, the redirect URI is incorrectly set to 'undefined', causing the application to crash.
applies_when: Redirect URI is configured in Entra ID
not_this_if: Redirect URI is correctly set and deployed
No issues with browser local storage
root_cause: The issue arises when the browser's local storage or cookies contain outdated or conflicting data that interferes with the OpenID authentication process, leading to an incorrect redirect URI.
fix_steps: Retry the authentication process with the OpenID plugin
agent_instruction: Clear your browser's local storage and cookies, then attempt the OpenID authentication again.
